classificationHint.rationale: Standalone top-right text acts like a tappable reset action.
Circular icon control with arrow glyph indicates navigation back action.
Back affordance container represents a tappable icon button.
Top header cluster with back affordance, title, and reset action behaves like app bar.
Label above outlined field with current text value strongly indicates single-line text input.
Small square with delivery label suggests unchecked option control.
Compact labeled option row with checkbox-like affordance behaves like a selectable delivery mode chip.
Selected bordered box with checkmark-like vector and label indicates active pickup option.
Selected delivery mode with checkmark and label appears as a choice chip / segmented option.
Bounded field container with visible monetary value inside a price section suggests editable price input.

classificationHint.rationale: Section label above large outlined area with paragraph text suggests multiline details input.

semanticSummary.explanation: Screen is a product/item creation form with media upload, name, price, ingredient selection, details, and save action.
warnings: Ingredient section is extracted as a prebuilt widget, so fine-grained option contracts are summarized at the section level.
Some upload tiles are visually repeated add placeholders with unclear exact interaction semantics beyond media attachment.

semanticVerdicts.explanation: Outlined field with uppercase label and current item-name value indicates a single-line item name input.
Price section combines a numeric field and a two-option fulfillment selector with visible selected state on Pick up.

semanticVerdicts.explanation: Labeled large outlined box with paragraph content indicates a multiline details/description input.
Upload section contains a heading and three slot tiles, two clearly marked Add placeholders and one filled preview tile.
Extracted ingredients section presents multiple icon chips grouped under Basic and Fruit headings with a highlighted pepper tile suggesting selectable ingredient options.
Large bottom filled button labeled Save Changes is the primary submit action.
Circular leading back affordance in the header is a navigation button.
Header Reset text likely clears the form or reverts edits.

classificationHint.rationale: Dashed bordered placeholder tile with centered add affordance suggests tappable media-add tile.
